remarks: Oversized and updated studio w/ alcove in modern midrise bldg! Heat/hot water/sewer included! Sunfilled living area w/ walls of glass, Gourmet kitchen w/ stainless steel appliances, high end cabinetry, stone countertops, sleeping nook - lots of closets, modern bathroom, air conditioning, gleaming hardwood floors throughout, fresh paint, off st parking, laundry on site, professional gym, cat ok, on site storage available. Minutes to highways, beaches, shops, nightlife and train! Must see unit!
